summary: The provider-change path now honors the next-send stop lock at the handler boundary and the stop-lock proof dispatches a blocked provider change directly.

targeted_proof.command: npm run test:summary:client -- --file client/src/test/chatPage.stop.test.tsx --test-name "locks model changes and new-conversation resets when the selected conversation is stopping without an inflight id yet"
targeted_proof.notes: Targeted client wrapper proved provider changes dispatched through the hidden select input are ignored while the selected conversation is stop-locked.
